creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Hello,

Pleaser review D43861 (Ocaml 4.14.1 upgrade), which fixes the build of ledit by addind the findlib dependency, upgrade to 2.06, switch USE_GITHUB, and the trivial patch for the Camlp5/Gramlib, Genlex, Stream being moved out of OCaml core into caml-camlp-streams. Thank you!
